assignments.name: Assign_Approval_Status_on_Quote_Document
assignments.label: Assign Approval Status on Quote Document

assignments.description: Assign Opportunity Line of Business from Quote and set update flag
assignments.name: Assign_Opportunity_LOB_and_Flag
assignments.label: Assign Opportunity LOB and Flag

assignments.name: Set_Opportunity_Deal_Type_To_Renewal
assignments.label: Set Opportunity Deal Type To Renewal

assignments.name: setup_Service_Invoicing_Contact_as_Billing
assignments.label: setup Service Invoicing Contact as Billing

assignments.name: Update_Contract_Master_Terms_and_Sales_Segment
assignments.label: Update Contract Master Terms and Sales Segment

assignments.name: Update_Master_Contract_LOB_and
assignments.label: Update Master Contract LOB and Owner

decisions.name: Approval_field_changes_to_update_approval_level
decisions.label: Approval field changes to update approval level

decisions.name: Assign_Email_Address_as_per_Subsidiary
decisions.label: Assign Email Address as per Subsidiary

decisions.name: Check_Approval_Status_If_Not_Approved
decisions.label: Check Approval Status If Not Approved

decisions.description: BIZ-83519: Immediately sync Deal_Type__c from the primary Quote to its Opportunity when the field changes, so the value is available to OP4I without waiting for the 2-minute scheduled path.
decisions.name: Check_Deal_Type_Sync_Needed
decisions.label: Check Deal Type Sync Needed

decisions.description: Check if Opportunity Line of Business needs to be updated from Quote
decisions.name: Check_Opportunity_LOB_Update_Needed
decisions.label: Check Opportunity LOB Update Needed

rules.name: Update_Opportunity_LOB
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4) OR (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 5)
rules.label: Update Opportunity LOB

decisions.name: Check_quote_if_quote_is_Auto_renewal
decisions.label: Check quote if quote is Auto renewal

rules.name: Outcome_1_of_Check_quote_if_quote_is_Auto_renewal
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND (7 OR 8)

rightValue.stringValue: Tax Amount Is Up To Date

rules.label: Outcome 1 of Check quote if quote is Auto renewal

decisions.name: Current_Contact_Loop_Contains_Duplicate_Contact
decisions.label: Current Contact Loop Contains Duplicate Contact

rules.name: check_the_condition_for_new_quotes
rules.label: check the condition for new quotes

decisions.name: If_Renewal_letter_is_not_present
decisions.label: If Renewal letter is not present

decisions.name: Is_Approval_Status_Changed_To_Approved
decisions.label: Is Approval Status Changed To Approved

decisions.name: myRule_43
decisions.label: Populate total contract amount to Opportunity
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: FALSE_Populate total contract amount to Opportunity

rules.name: TRUE_myRule_43
rules.conditionLogic: ((2 AND 1 AND 4) OR (3 AND 1 AND 4)) AND 5
rules.label: TRUE_Populate total contract amount to Opportunity

decisions.name: Opportunity_Is_Not_Blank_On_Quote
decisions.label: Opportunity Is Not Blank On Quote

rules.name: when_status_of_quote_is_Approved
rules.label: when status of quote is Approved(Finalise OSA)

decisions.name: Renewal_Quote_type_is_Renewal_Changes
decisions.label: Renewal Quote type is Renewal Changes

decisions.description: Update the sales segment on quote and related Lead fields on quote
decisions.name: Sales_Segment_Update
decisions.label: Sales Segment Update

decisions.name: Special_Payment_Records_Is_Not_Null
decisions.label: Special Payment Records Is Not Null

rules.name: Check_Quote_Type_If_Renewal_Or_Consolidated
rules.label: Check Quote Type If Renewal Or Consolidated

decisions.description: Verify if Renewal Quote Type is Renewal Changes or Auto-Renewal. Also checks Account is not null to prevent NPE.
decisions.name: Verify_Renewal_Quote_Type
decisions.label: Verify Renewal Quote Type

Flow.description: BIZ-72861 - Auto-update Opportunity Line of Business from Primary Quote BIZ-67601 - Populate Subsidiary Address BIZ-65528 - Reverse back wrongly removed changes BIZ-65528 Remove unconnected nodes. BIZ-63629 Remove Quote line loop changes replaced with price rules BIZ-64548 Updated currency ISO code in renewal letter Modified as part of BIZ-46894.Updated the flow with the modified version Updated: RR/17/11: Updated Pricing and proposal status decisions and formula Updated RR:11/21: Updated formula field for approval check Updated RR: update Not required only when new quote is created. Updating the description Updated RR: Trigger email alert BIZ-52845: AB : Added Async path BIZ-48336: AB: Added Sales Segment fields to payload. BIZ-52845: AB : Removed async path cause of too many Queueable jobs error. BIZ-53673: Removed and moved update pricing and proposal status to Before update along with a new condition BIZ-61359 Removed Pricing Proposal references BIZ-61795 Renewal Deal not created for 1 year Contract when Renewal Opp created BIZ-61797 Tax calculating properly but not included in Renewal Letter document BIZ-64321 Cancellation Quotes (Deal Type = Other) for Contract Consolidation Should Not Require OSA or Approvals BIZ-65065 Auto-populate fields on auto-renewal Salesforce Quotes - Contract Master Terms, OP4I Sales Segment BIZ-65558 - Set Opportunity - Renewal Quote Type field to Primary Quote's Renewal Quote Type value BIZ-66291 - Revenue Forecast Fields BIZ-66415 - Added the Bypass Logic BIZ-67601 - Assignment Checks BIZ-68938 - Adjusting Renewal Payments Letter for Deloitte BIZ-68938 - Special Account Subsidiary Assignment BIZ-71806 - Only sync approved OSA bundles to OP4i BIZ-74249 - Update Opp Subsidiary to match Quote Subsidiary value. BIZ-73705 - Added checks to restrict RL creation for contract filters BIZ-73018 - Updated recepient Email address For Approved email BIZ-80912 - Removed OP4i Deal Owner references with OwnerId

formulas.name: approvalEmailTemplateSubject
formulas.expression: IF(ISBLANK({!$Record.SBQQ__Opportunity2__c}), "Your Quote has been Approved", "Your Quote has been Approved -" + {!$Record.SBQQ__Opportunity2__r.Name})

formulas.description: To populated the value of billing frequency when Billing frequency approval level is highest
formulas.name: Approverbillingfrequency

formulas.description: To populated the value of Additional free month when Additional free month approval level is highest
formulas.name: Approverfreemonth
formulas.expression: IF(({!$Record.Highest_Approver_level__c} = {!$Record.Free_month_approver_Level__c}),"Additional Free months at no cost , ","")

formulas.description: when minimum year is max level
formulas.name: Approverminimumyear
formulas.expression: IF(({!$Record.Highest_Approver_level__c} = {!$Record.Minimum_year_approver_level__c}),"Min year on year committed spend , ","")

formulas.description: when payments term value has highest approver
formulas.name: ApproverPaymentterm

formulas.description: when initial term discount value has highest approval level
formulas.name: HighestapprovernameInitialtermdiscount

formulas.description: To check is the quote new.
formulas.name: Isnew

formulas.description: Formula field to update the status value
formulas.name: Pricingproposalfieldupdateformula

formulas.description: Formula field to calculate the highest level of approver based on the value of Implementation Discount field value 0 - No Approver 1 - Sales Segment 2. - Industry sales Lead 3 - CRO 5 - SVP, Services
formulas.name: Service_ImplementationDiscountLevel

formulas.description: formula to calculate service only level on the basis of Discount percentage value
formulas.name: serviceonlyformulalevel

Flow.label: Quote After Insert-Update

recordLookups.name: fetch_Quote_Documents_associated_with_the_Quote
recordLookups.label: fetch Quote Documents associated with the Quote

recordLookups.description: To get the approver matrix record on the basis of sales segment field on quote
recordLookups.name: Get_Approver_Matrix
recordLookups.label: Get Approver Matrix

recordUpdates.description: BIZ-83519: Immediately write Quote.Deal_Type__c to the related Opportunity so OP4I sync is not delayed by the 2-minute scheduled path.
recordUpdates.name: Sync_Deal_Type_To_Opp
recordUpdates.label: Sync Deal Type To Opp

value.stringValue: Automated Tax Calculation Triggered, Please Refresh Your Browser

textTemplates.name: Approvaltemplatepricing
textTemplates.text: Hello {!$Record.SubmittedUser__r.FirstName}, Pricing Proposal for OSA {!$Record.OSA_Number__c} has been Approved. Please access the record to view the details. Note: Please do not reply to this email as it is not monitored, and your message will not be received.

textTemplates.name: ApproveTemplateOSA
textTemplates.text:
Hello {!$Record.SubmittedUser__r.FirstName}, The OSA for {!$Record.SBQQ__Opportunity2__r.Name} has been Approved. Please access {!$Label.recordurl}/lightning/r/SBQQ__Quote__c/{!$Record.Id}/view to view the details.
Note: Please do not reply to this email as it is not monitored, and your message will not be received.

variables.description: This collection stores list of opportunities to be updated.
variables.name: lstUpdateOpportunity

variables.description: This variable stores the Opportunity to be updated outside the quote update context.
variables.name: updateOpportunityAsync
